hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】热点就业报告显示美联储进一步降息遥不可及，主席沃什面临政策考验；【FINANCE】美联储主席沃什在央行任命首批员工，其中包括《Project 2025》作者；【FINANCE】比特币正在崩溃，但华尔街新的加密货币炒作正在兴起。

items.title: Hot jobs report puts Fed cuts further out of reach as Chair Warsh faces policy tests
items.summary: Another big jobs report in May has swept aside the possibility of interest rate cuts anytime soon.
items.title_zh: 热点就业报告显示美联储进一步降息遥不可及，主席沃什面临政策考验
items.summary_zh: 五月份的另一份重要就业报告排除了近期降息的可能性。

items.title: Fed Chair Warsh makes first hires at central bank, including 'Project 2025' author
items.summary: The new Fed chair has made his first hires. One wrote the Fed chapter in the conservative policy blueprint "Project 2025."
items.title_zh: 美联储主席沃什在央行任命首批员工，其中包括《Project 2025》作者
items.summary_zh: 新任美联储主席已经任命了他的第一批人选。其中一人在保守派政策蓝图“2025 年计划”中撰写了美联储章节。

items.title: Bitcoin is cratering, but a new Wall Street crypto hype is on the rise
items.summary: As bitcoin dropped to its lowest price since 2024, investors flock to a new type of crypto investment linked to the hyperliquid platforms, HYPE ETFs.
items.title_zh: 比特币正在崩溃，但华尔街新的加密货币炒作正在兴起
items.summary_zh: 随着比特币跌至 2024 年以来的最低价格，投资者纷纷涌向与超流动性平台相关的新型加密货币投资——HYPE ETF。

items.title: Where investors may find the next 'big wave' for AI trade
items.summary: Tim Urbanowicz, chief investment strategist at Innovator from Goldman Sachs Asset Management, tackles the AI boom.
items.title_zh: 投资者可能会在哪里找到人工智能贸易的下一个“大浪潮”
items.summary_zh: 高盛资产管理公司 Innovator 首席投资策略师 Tim Urbanowicz 应对人工智能热潮。

items.title: Iranians Sink Into Despair Facing War Deaths and Skyrocketing Inflation
items.summary: An imploding economy is causing hopelessness among both pro- and anti-government Iranians. And for those who wished for regime change, the letdown is palpable.
items.title_zh: 面对战争死亡和飙升的通货膨胀，伊朗人陷入绝望
items.summary_zh: 崩溃的经济让亲政府和反政府的伊朗人都感到绝望。对于那些希望政权更迭的人来说，失望是显而易见的。

items.title: Peru’s Presidential Runoff Could Swing the Country to the Right: What to Know
items.summary: Facing a surge in violence, voters will choose between a newly moderated left and a right-wing candidate representing an autocrat’s divisive legacy.
items.title_zh: 秘鲁总统决选可能使国家向右转：需要了解什么
items.summary_zh: 面对暴力激增，选民将在新近温和的左翼候选人和代表独裁者分裂遗产的右翼候选人之间做出选择。

items.title: Bitcoin's slide has no single cause. AI, tech IPOs, quantum, Strategy sale all play a role, NYDIG says
items.summary: Not one, but several overlapping headwinds are hitting the crypto market at once, weighing on bitcoin's price, the firm's head of research Greg Cipolaro said.
items.title_zh: 比特币的下滑并不是单一原因造成的。 NYDIG 表示，人工智能、科技 IPO、量子、战略出售都发挥了作用
items.summary_zh: 该公司研究主管格雷格·西波拉罗（Greg Cipolaro）表示，不是一个，而是几个重叠的逆风同时袭击了加密货币市场，从而打压了比特币的价格。

items.title: How Endava is redesigning software delivery around AI agents
items.summary: Learn how Endava is using AI agents, ChatGPT Enterprise, and Codex to accelerate software delivery, automate workflows, and build an AI-native culture across the enterprise.
items.title_zh: Endava 如何围绕人工智能代理重新设计软件交付
items.summary_zh: 了解 Endava 如何使用 AI 代理、ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex 来加速软件交付、自动化工作流程并在整个企业中构建 AI 原生文化。

items.title: Bitcoin near $60,000 today vs February: Institutional sentiment has flipped
items.summary: Bitcoin’s return to $60,000 is drawing heavy ETF outflows, marking a sharp reversal from February when institutional selling eased into the dip.
items.title_zh: 与 2 月份相比，今天比特币接近 60,000 美元：机构情绪发生了转变
items.summary_zh: 比特币重回 60,000 美元正吸引大量 ETF 资金流出，这标志着与 2 月份机构抛售放缓至下跌时期相比的急剧逆转。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation cuts and departures aren't a crisis, Joe Lubin says
items.summary: The Consensys leader told CoinDesk the Ethereum Foundation's role should be narrower and more focused on stewarding the network's core technology and values.
items.title_zh: 乔·鲁宾 (Joe Lubin) 表示，以太坊基金会的裁员和退出并不是一场危机
items.summary_zh: 这位 Consensys 领导人告诉 CoinDesk，以太坊基金会的角色应该更窄，更专注于管理网络的核心技术和价值。

items.title: Bitcoin, ether eye worst weekly rout since FTX collapse as cryptos shed $390 billion
items.summary: A week that began with Strategy's bitcoin sale ended with one of the largest crypto market drawdowns in years.
items.title_zh: 比特币、以太坊遭遇自 FTX 崩溃以来最严重的一周暴跌，加密货币损失 3900 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 以Strategy的比特币销售开始的一周以多年来最大的加密市场跌幅之一结束。

items.title: America’s largest banks are building a new digital currency network to stop a massive deposit drain
items.summary: America’s biggest banks are launching tokenized deposits to compete with stablecoins, opening a new front in the race to become the dominant form of cash on blockchain networks.
items.title_zh: 美国最大的银行正在建立一个新的数字货币网络，以阻止大规模存款流失
items.summary_zh: 美国最大的银行正在推出代币化存款来与稳定币竞争，为成为区块链网络上现金的主导形式的竞争开辟了新战线。

items.title: Michael Saylor hints at fresh bitcoin buy with ‘add more dots’ post as Strategy sits $11.7 billion underwater
items.summary: The post lands a week after Strategy revealed its first bitcoin sale since 2022 and one day before voting closes on a STRC dividend amendment.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·塞勒 (Michael Saylor) 暗示将购买新的比特币，并发表“添加更多点”帖子，因为 Strategy 的资金已达 117 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章发布的一周前，Strategy 公布了自 2022 年以来的首次比特币销售，且在 STRC 股息修正案投票结束前一天。

items.title: Morgan Stanley will soon open its trillion-dollar wealth management funnel to AI agents
items.summary: Morgan Stanley's move is one of the earliest instances of a major Wall Street bank opening its platforms to external AI tools.
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利即将向人工智能代理开放万亿美元财富管理渠道
items.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利的举动是华尔街主要银行向外部人工智能工具开放其平台的最早实例之一。

items.title: Israel strikes Beirut suburb days after US-brokered truce
items.summary: Israel says the attacks on the Lebanese capital were ordered "in response to Hezbollah's firing at Israeli territory".
items.title_zh: 在美国斡旋的休战几天后，以色列袭击了贝鲁特郊区
items.summary_zh: 以色列表示，对黎巴嫩首都的袭击是“为了回应真主党向以色列领土开火”而下令的。

items.title: Israel Bombs Beirut Outskirts as Fighting With Hezbollah Escalates
items.summary: The Trump administration has pushed for a cease-fire, bringing Israeli and Lebanese officials together for talks in Washington. But so far, Hezbollah has rejected the truce.
items.title_zh: 以色列轰炸贝鲁特郊区，与真主党的战斗升级
items.summary_zh: 特朗普政府推动停火，召集以色列和黎巴嫩官员在华盛顿举行会谈。但到目前为止，真主党拒绝了停火协议。

items.title: Bybit follows Kraken in offering tokenized SpaceX IPO access via xStocks
items.summary: The product is built on Payward's xStocks framework, the tokenized equities platform Kraken acquired through its purchase of Backed Finance in late 2025.
items.title_zh: Bybit 跟随 Kraken 的脚步，通过 xStocks 提供代币化 SpaceX IPO 访问权
items.summary_zh: 该产品基于 Payward 的 xStocks 框架构建，该框架是 Kraken 通过 2025 年底收购 Backed Finance 获得的代币化股票平台。

items.title: Hyperion DeFi to unwind $29 million in HYPE deals with Felix, Native Markets as USDH sunsets
items.summary: Roughly 800,000 HYPE will return to the company's treasury for redeployment to "more profitable" strategies, per a Friday filing.
items.title_zh: 随着 USDH 的退出，Hyperion DeFi 将与 Felix、Native Markets 解除 2900 万美元的 HYPE 交易
items.summary_zh: 根据周五提交的文件，大约 800,000 枚 HYPE 将返回公司库房，重新部署到“利润更高”的战略。

items.title: Hyperliquid treasuries stand alone in profit as legacy crypto DATs bleed billions
items.summary: Strategy, Bitmine, and other major treasury firms have seen paper gains evaporate as crypto prices continue sliding.
items.title_zh: 随着传统加密货币 DAT 损失数十亿美元，超流动性国债在利润方面独树一帜
items.summary_zh: 随着加密货币价格持续下滑，Strategy、Bitmine 和其他主要财务公司的账面收益蒸发了。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #113.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 113 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Zcash (ZEC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #15.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：Zcash (ZEC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 15。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #11.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 11。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Humanity (H)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #54.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：人性 (H)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 54。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bitcoin (BTC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #1.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：比特币 (BTC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.title: A blueprint for democratic governance of frontier AI
items.summary: OpenAI outlines a blueprint for U.S. governance of frontier AI, proposing a federal framework for safety, resilience, and national security.
items.title_zh: 前沿人工智能民主治理蓝图
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 勾勒出美国前沿人工智能治理的蓝图，提出了安全、弹性和国家安全的联邦框架。

items.title: Teaching AI agents to ask better questions by playing “Battleship”
items.summary: MIT researchers use the classic game as a test bed for AI agents, finding a small AI model can outperform the biggest ones at 1 percent of the cost.
items.title_zh: 通过玩“战舰”来教人工智能代理提出更好的问题
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员使用这款经典游戏作为 AI 代理的测试平台，发现小型 AI 模型可以以 1% 的成本超越最大的模型。

items.title: MIT researchers teach AI models to interpret charts
items.summary: The new ChartNet training dataset could improve the accuracy of vision-language models that help analyze business trends or interpret scientific figures.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员教人工智能模型解释图表
items.summary_zh: 新的 ChartNet 训练数据集可以提高视觉语言模型的准确性，帮助分析业务趋势或解释科学数据。

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Bitcoin set to slump to new lows for 2026 after recent sell-off, traders forecast
items.summary: The cryptocurrency is likely to break below its lows hit in early February, traders on prediction market Kalshi believe.
items.title_zh: 交易员预测，在最近的抛售之后，比特币将在 2026 年跌至新低
items.summary_zh: 预测市场 Kalshi 的交易员认为，加密货币可能会跌破 2 月初触及的低点。

items.title: A crypto pioneer who turned a $20 million family stake into a billion-dollar fund doubles down on bitcoin
items.summary: Sourcing initial capital from his mother to build a $1 billion crypto empire, DFG CEO James Wo says market metrics do not support Tom Lee’s $250,000 ether prediction.
items.title_zh: 一位加密货币先驱将 2000 万美元的家族股份变成了 10 亿美元的基金，加倍投资比特币
items.summary_zh: DFG 首席执行官 James Wo 从母亲那里获得初始资金来建立一个 10 亿美元的加密货币帝国，他表示市场指标并不支持 Tom Lee 的 25 万美元以太坊预测。

items.title: Satoshi-era bitcoin at center of $285 billion lawsuit moves after 14 years
items.summary: The 1LwWt address received a legal notice from Salomon Brothers via Bitcoin's OP_RETURN field in July 2025 demanding the owner prove ownership by November 5, 2025.
items.title_zh: 14年后，中本聪时代的比特币成为2850亿美元诉讼的中心
items.summary_zh: 1LwWt 地址于 2025 年 7 月通过比特币的 OP_RETURN 字段收到所罗门兄弟的法律通知，要求所有者在 2025 年 11 月 5 日之前证明所有权。

items.title: Wallet linked to Ethereum co-founder Joseph Lubin moves 110,000 ETH to defend $259 million DAI debt position
items.summary: Onchain analysts described the move as defensive collateral management to reduce liquidation risk, not likely a sale.
items.title_zh: 与以太坊联合创始人 Joseph Lubin 相关的钱包转移了 110,000 ETH，以捍卫 2.59 亿美元的 DAI 债务头寸
items.summary_zh: Onchain 分析师将此举描述为防御性抵押品管理，以降低清算风险，而不是出售。

items.title: Crypto Council for Innovation launches coalition to push for regulatory clarity on vaults
items.summary: A new coalition is forming, focused on crypto vaults, an increasingly popular mechanism for depositing digital assets and earning yield.
items.title_zh: 加密货币创新委员会成立联盟，推动金库监管明确化
items.summary_zh: 一个新的联盟正在形成，专注于加密金库，这是一种越来越流行的存储数字资产和赚取收益的机制。

items.title: Introducing new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind
items.summary: GPT-Rosalind advances life sciences research with enhanced biological reasoning, medicinal chemistry expertise, genomics analysis, and experimental workflow capabilities.
items.title_zh: 向 GPT-Rosalind 引入新功能
items.summary_zh: GPT-Rosalind 通过增强的生物推理、药物化学专业知识、基因组学分析和实验工作流程功能推进生命科学研究。

items.title: Introducing Mellum2: A 12B Mixture-of-Experts Model by JetBrains
items.title_zh: Mellum2 简介：JetBrains 的 12B 专家混合模型

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.summary: We've been busy! Here’s a rundown of the top announcements, launches and demos at I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 I/O 2026 上宣布的 100 件事
items.summary_zh: 我们一直很忙！以下是 I/O 2026 上最重要的公告、发布和演示的摘要。

items.title: The crucial human component in computing and AI
items.summary: The MIT Ethics of Computing Research Symposium brought together experts and researchers working at the heart of ethical and social impact in technology.
items.title_zh: 计算和人工智能中至关重要的人类组成部分
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院计算机伦理研究研讨会汇集了从事技术伦理和社会影响核心工作的专家和研究人员。

items.title: NSF renews support for MIT-led AI and physics institute, expanding a new model for discovery
items.summary: IAIFI enters its second phase with increased funding, broader ambitions, and a growing community at the frontier of AI and fundamental physics.
items.title_zh: NSF 继续支持麻省理工学院领导的人工智能和物理研究所，拓展新的发现模式
items.summary_zh: IAIFI 进入第二阶段，资金增加、雄心勃勃，人工智能和基础物理学前沿社区不断壮大。

items.title: Building AI models that understand chemical principles
items.summary: Connor Coley works at the interface of chemistry and machine learning, to discover and design new drug compounds.
items.title_zh: 构建理解化学原理的人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: Connor Coley 致力于化学和机器学习的结合，发现和设计新的药物化合物。

items.title: China poaches more AI talent from the U.S. as it eyes the next 'super-app'
items.summary: Tencent Chief AI Scientist Yao Shunyu, who joined the company from OpenAI, said Friday he aims to pursue artificial general intelligence.
items.title_zh: 中国从美国挖走更多人工智能人才，着眼下一个“超级应用”
items.summary_zh: 从 OpenAI 加入腾讯的首席人工智能科学家姚舜宇周五表示，他的目标是追求通用人工智能。

items.title: Kalshi is building a prediction markets 'Bloomberg Terminal' for high-end traders, source says
items.summary: The prediction market platform is developing the platform to create a singular platform for its highly engaged traders.
items.title_zh: 消息人士称，Kalshi 正在为高端交易者建立预测市场“彭博终端”
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台正在开发该平台，为其高度参与的交易者创建一个单一的平台。

items.title: Traders say Karen Bass and Spencer Pratt will advance to runoff in high-profile LA mayoral race
items.summary: Los Angeles voters go to the polls Tuesday. If no candidate receives more than 50%, the top-two vote getters will advance to a November runoff.
items.title_zh: 交易员称凯伦·巴斯和斯宾塞·普拉特将在备受瞩目的洛杉矶市长竞选中晋级决选
items.summary_zh: 洛杉矶选民周二前往投票站。如果没有候选人获得超过 50% 的支持，得票最多的两名候选人将进入 11 月的决选。

items.title: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon says markets are in 'greed' mode as AI companies seek billions
items.summary: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon's comments come as investors prepare for what will be one of the busiest periods for equity issuance in years.
items.title_zh: 高盛首席执行官大卫·所罗门表示，随着人工智能公司寻求数十亿美元的投资，市场处于“贪婪”模式

items.title: Member of Neo-Nazi Party Reaches Mayoral Runoff in German Town
items.summary: Since the fall of the Third Reich, German voters have shunned mayoral candidates from neo-Nazi parties. That could change on Sunday in a small town in the country’s east.

items.title: Abra’s Bill Barhydt says Wall Street’s next crypto bet is tokenization
items.summary: As Abra prepares for a Nasdaq debut, CEO Bill Barhydt is betting tokenized yield products and onchain lending will drive the next phase of crypto wealth management.

items.title: Meta is paying creators in Stablecoins. Spending them is someone else's problem
items.summary: Meta’s decision to pay creators in USDC validates stablecoins as a mainstream disbursement tool, Joslyn suggests, but it also exposes the industry’s unresolved problem: moving seamlessly from digital dollars to usable local currency.
items.title_zh: Meta 用稳定币向创作者支付费用。花掉它们是别人的问题
items.summary_zh: Joslyn 表示，Meta 决定用 USDC 向创作者支付费用，这验证了稳定币作为主流支付工具的地位，但这也暴露了该行业尚未解决的问题：从数字美元无缝转向可用的当地货币。

items.title: A massive hiring wave reveals trading firms are no longer viewing Polymarket as a niche betting tool
items.summary: While rising volume on Polymarket and Kalshi is attracting quantitative firms to prediction markets, they aren't focusing on event outcomes; rather, they're exploiting market inefficiencies for profit.
items.title_zh: 大规模的招聘浪潮表明贸易公司不再将 Polymarket 视为利基博彩工具
items.summary_zh: 虽然 Polymarket 和 Kalshi 交易量的增加吸引了定量公司进入预测市场，但他们并不关注事件结果；而是关注事件结果。相反，他们正在利用市场低效率来获取利润。

items.title: HTX to delist Trump-linked USD1 after saying World Liberty Financial froze exchange-linked addresses
items.summary: The move follows World Liberty Financial's apparent freeze of HTX-linked on-chain addresses, citing UK sanctions compliance, per HTX.
